title: Motivational factors and the hospitality industry

sentences.en: A critical ingredient in the success of hotels is developing and maintaining superior performance from their employees.
sentences.zh: 酒店成功的一个关键要素，是培养并保持员工的卓越表现。

grammar.type: 主系表 + 动名词表语
grammar.note: 主干 A critical ingredient... is developing and maintaining superior performance；表语为并列动名词 developing and maintaining；from their employees 为后置状语。

sentences.en: How is that accomplished?
sentences.zh: 这是如何实现的呢？

grammar.type: 被动疑问句
grammar.note: How is that accomplished 为一般疑问的被动结构，accomplish 意为“完成、实现”，主语 that 指代前句所述目标。

sentences.en: What Human Resource Management (HRM) practices should organizations invest in to acquire and retain great employees?
sentences.zh: 组织应当投资于哪些人力资源管理（HRM）实践，才能招揽并留住优秀员工？

grammar.type: 特殊疑问句 + 不定式目的
grammar.note: What... practices 为疑问词短语作 invest in 的宾语；to acquire and retain great employees 为不定式作目的状语，两个动词 acquire 与 retain 并列。

sentences.en: Some hotels aim to provide superior working conditions for their employees.
sentences.zh: 一些酒店力求为员工提供优越的工作条件。

grammar.type: aim to do 结构
grammar.note: 主干 Some hotels aim to provide superior working conditions；aim to do 意为“旨在做、力求做”；for their employees 为受益对象状语。

sentences.en: The idea originated from workplaces – usually in the non-service sector – that emphasized fun and enjoyment as part of work–life balance.
sentences.zh: 这一理念源自那些强调把乐趣和享受作为工作与生活平衡之一部分的工作场所——通常是非服务行业的工作场所。

grammar.type: 破折号插入 + 定语从句
grammar.note: 主干 The idea originated from workplaces；两破折号间 usually in the non-service sector 为插入语；that emphasized fun and enjoyment as part of work–life balance 为定语从句修饰 workplaces。

sentences.en: By contrast, the service sector, and more specifically hotels, has traditionally not extended these practices to address basic employee needs, such as good working conditions.
sentences.zh: 相比之下，服务行业——更具体地说是酒店业——历来没有把这些做法延伸到满足员工的基本需求上，比如良好的工作条件。

grammar.type: 对比状语 + 现在完成时
grammar.note: By contrast 表对比；主语 the service sector, and more specifically hotels，谓语 has... not extended these practices；to address basic employee needs 为不定式作目的状语，such as good working conditions 为举例。

sentences.en: Pfeffer (1994) emphasizes that in order to succeed in a global business environment, organizations must make investment in Human Resource Management (HRM) to allow them to acquire employees who possess better skills and capabilities than their competitors.
sentences.zh: 普费弗（1994）强调，为了在全球商业环境中取得成功，组织必须对人力资源管理（HRM）进行投资，从而使自己能够招揽到比竞争对手拥有更好技能和能力的员工。

grammar.type: 宾语从句 + 目的状语 + 定语从句
grammar.note: 主干 Pfeffer emphasizes that...，that 引导宾语从句；in order to succeed... 为目的状语；to allow them to acquire employees 为不定式；who possess better skills and capabilities than their competitors 为定语从句修饰 employees。

sentences.en: This investment will be to their competitive advantage.
sentences.zh: 这样的投资将会成为他们的竞争优势。

grammar.type: 主系表 + to one’s advantage
grammar.note: 主干 This investment will be to their competitive advantage；to one's advantage 意为“对……有利、成为……的优势”。

sentences.en: Despite this recognition of the importance of employee development, the hospitality industry has historically been dominated by underdeveloped HR practices (Lucas, 2002).
sentences.zh: 尽管人们认识到了员工发展的重要性，酒店业在历史上却一直被欠发达的人力资源实践所主导（卢卡斯，2002）。

grammar.type: Despite 让步状语 + 现在完成时被动
grammar.note: Despite this recognition of the importance of employee development 为介词短语作让步状语；主干 the hospitality industry has... been dominated by underdeveloped HR practices（现在完成时被动）。

words.def: 不发达的；未充分发展的

sentences.en: Lucas also points out that ‘the substance of HRM practices does not appear to be designed to foster constructive relations with employees or to represent a managerial approach that enables developing and drawing out the full potential of people, even though employees may be broadly satisfied with many aspects of their work’ (Lucas, 2002).
sentences.zh: 卢卡斯还指出：“人力资源管理实践的实质，似乎并非旨在培养与员工之间的建设性关系，也并非要体现一种能够开发并发掘人的全部潜能的管理方法——尽管员工可能对其工作的许多方面大体上感到满意”（卢卡斯，2002）。

grammar.type: 宾语从句 + 不定式并列 + 让步从句
grammar.note: 主干 Lucas... points out that...；从句 the substance... does not appear to be designed to foster... or to represent...，两个不定式由 or 并列；that enables developing and drawing out the full potential 为定语从句；even though... 为让步状语从句。

sentences.en: In addition, or maybe as a result, high employee turnover has been a recurring problem throughout the hospitality industry.
sentences.zh: 此外——或许正是其结果——高员工流失率一直是整个酒店业反复出现的问题。

grammar.type: 插入状语 + 现在完成时
grammar.note: In addition, or maybe as a result 为插入性状语；主干 high employee turnover has been a recurring problem；throughout the hospitality industry 为范围状语。

sentences.en: Among the many cited reasons are low compensation, inadequate benefits, poor working conditions and compromised employee morale and attitudes (Maroudas et al., 2008).
sentences.zh: 在被援引的众多原因中，包括薪酬偏低、福利不足、工作条件差，以及员工士气和态度受损（马鲁达斯等，2008）。

grammar.type: 完全倒装
grammar.note: Among the many cited reasons are... 为地点/范围状语提前引起的完全倒装，真正主语为其后一系列并列名词短语 low compensation, inadequate benefits, poor working conditions and compromised employee morale and attitudes。

sentences.en: Ng and Sorensen (2008) demonstrated that when managers provide recognition to employees, motivate employees to work together, and remove obstacles preventing effective performance, employees feel more obligated to stay with the company.
sentences.zh: 吴和索伦森（2008）证明，当管理者给予员工认可、激励员工协作、并清除妨碍有效表现的障碍时，员工会更觉得有义务留在公司。

grammar.type: 宾语从句 + when 时间从句(三并列谓语)
grammar.note: 主干 Ng and Sorensen demonstrated that...；when 引导时间状语从句，含三个并列谓语 provide... motivate... and remove...；主句 employees feel more obligated to stay，preventing effective performance 为现在分词定语修饰 obstacles。

sentences.en: This was succinctly summarized by Michel et al. (2013): ‘[P]roviding support to employees gives them the confidence to perform their jobs better and the motivation to stay with the organization.’
sentences.zh: 米歇尔等人（2013）对此作了简洁的总结：“向员工提供支持，能给予他们把工作做得更好的信心，以及留在组织中的动力。”

grammar.type: 被动语态 + 冒号引语 + 动名词主语
grammar.note: 主句 This was succinctly summarized by Michel et al.（被动）；冒号后引语主语为动名词短语 Providing support to employees，谓语 gives them the confidence... and the motivation...，两宾语并列。

sentences.en: Hospitality organizations can therefore enhance employee motivation and retention through the development and improvement of their working conditions.
sentences.zh: 因此，酒店企业可以通过发展和改善工作条件来提升员工的积极性与留存率。

grammar.type: 情态动词 + through 方式状语
grammar.note: 主干 Hospitality organizations can... enhance employee motivation and retention；through the development and improvement of their working conditions 为方式状语；therefore 表结果。

sentences.en: These conditions are inherently linked to the working environment.
sentences.zh: 这些条件本质上与工作环境紧密相连。

grammar.type: 被动语态 + 副词状语
grammar.note: 主干 These conditions are... linked to the working environment（be linked to 被动结构）；inherently 意为“内在地、本质上”，修饰 linked。

sentences.en: While it seems likely that employees’ reactions to their job characteristics could be affected by a predisposition to view their work environment negatively, no evidence exists to support this hypothesis (Spector et al., 2000).
sentences.zh: 尽管员工对其工作特征的反应似乎有可能受到一种消极看待工作环境之倾向的影响，但并无证据支持这一假设（斯佩克特等，2000）。

grammar.type: While 让步从句 + 形式主语 + 被动
grammar.note: While it seems likely that... 为让步状语从句，it 为形式主语，that employees' reactions... could be affected by a predisposition... 为真正主语（被动）；主句 no evidence exists to support this hypothesis，to support... 为不定式定语。

sentences.en: However, given the opportunity, many people will find something to complain about in relation to their workplace (Poulston, 2009).
sentences.zh: 然而，一旦有机会，许多人总会找到一些与其工作场所有关的事情来抱怨（波尔斯顿，2009）。

grammar.type: 独立分词状语 + 不定式定语
grammar.note: given the opportunity 为过去分词短语作条件状语，相当于 if given the opportunity；主句 many people will find something to complain about，to complain about 为不定式定语修饰 something；in relation to 意为“关于、与……有关”。

sentences.en: There is a strong link between the perceptions of employees and particular factors of their work environment that are separate from the work itself, including company policies, salary and vacations.
sentences.zh: 员工的看法与其工作环境中若干独立于工作本身的特定因素之间，存在着密切的联系，这些因素包括公司政策、薪资和假期。

grammar.type: there be + 定语从句 + 举例
grammar.note: 主干 There is a strong link between A and B；that are separate from the work itself 为定语从句修饰 particular factors；including company policies, salary and vacations 为举例补充。

sentences.en: Such conditions are particularly troubling for the luxury hotel market, where high-quality service, requiring a sophisticated approach to HRM, is recognized as a critical source of competitive advantage (Maroudas et al., 2008).
sentences.zh: 这类状况对豪华酒店市场尤其棘手，因为在该市场中，需要精细人力资源管理方法的高品质服务，被视为竞争优势的关键来源（马鲁达斯等，2008）。

grammar.type: where 定语从句 + 现在分词插入
grammar.note: 主干 Such conditions are particularly troubling for the luxury hotel market；where... 为定语从句修饰 market；从句主语 high-quality service，谓语 is recognized as...；requiring a sophisticated approach to HRM 为现在分词短语作插入定语。

sentences.en: In a real sense, the services of hotel employees represent their industry (Schneider and Bowen, 1993).
sentences.zh: 从真正意义上说，酒店员工提供的服务代表着他们所处的行业（施奈德和鲍恩，1993）。

grammar.type: 主谓宾 + 介词短语状语
grammar.note: In a real sense 为状语，意为“从真正意义上”；主干 the services of hotel employees represent their industry。

sentences.en: This representation has commonly been limited to guest experiences.
sentences.zh: 这种代表通常仅限于宾客体验。

grammar.type: 现在完成时被动
grammar.note: 主干 This representation has... been limited to guest experiences（现在完成时被动）；be limited to 意为“局限于”。

sentences.en: This suggests that there has been a dichotomy between the guest environment provided in luxury hotels and the working conditions of their employees.
sentences.zh: 这表明，豪华酒店所提供的宾客环境与其员工的工作条件之间，一直存在着一种二分对立。

grammar.type: 宾语从句 + there be + 过去分词定语
grammar.note: 主干 This suggests that...；从句 there has been a dichotomy between A and B；provided in luxury hotels 为过去分词短语作 the guest environment 的后置定语。

sentences.en: It is therefore essential for hotel management to develop HRM practices that enable them to inspire and retain competent employees.
sentences.zh: 因此，酒店管理层必须制定能够激励并留住能干员工的人力资源管理实践。

grammar.type: 形式主语 it + for sb to do + 定语从句
grammar.note: It is essential for hotel management to develop HRM practices，it 为形式主语，for hotel management to develop... 为真正主语；that enable them to inspire and retain competent employees 为定语从句修饰 practices。

words.def: 必不可少的；至关重要的

sentences.en: This requires an understanding of what motivates employees at different levels of management and different stages of their careers (Enz and Siguaw, 2000).
sentences.zh: 这需要理解在不同管理层级、职业生涯不同阶段的员工受何种因素激励（恩茨和西瓜，2000）。

grammar.type: 宾语从句作介词宾语
grammar.note: 主干 This requires an understanding of...；of what motivates employees... 为介词宾语从句作 understanding 的后置定语；at different levels... and different stages... 为并列状语。

sentences.en: This implies that it is beneficial for hotel managers to understand what practices are most favorable to increase employee satisfaction and retention.
sentences.zh: 这意味着，酒店管理者理解哪些做法最有利于提升员工满意度和留存率，是大有裨益的。

grammar.type: 宾语从句 + 形式主语 + 内嵌宾语从句
grammar.note: 主干 This implies that...；从句 it is beneficial for hotel managers to understand...，it 为形式主语；what practices are most favorable to increase... 为 understand 的宾语从句。

sentences.en: Herzberg (1966) proposes that people have two major types of needs, the first being extrinsic motivation factors relating to the context in which work is performed, rather than the work itself.
sentences.zh: 赫茨伯格（1966）提出，人有两大类需求，第一类是与工作所处情境（而非工作本身）相关的外在激励因素。

grammar.type: 宾语从句 + 独立主格 + 定语从句
grammar.note: 主干 Herzberg proposes that people have two major types of needs；the first being extrinsic motivation factors 为独立主格结构作补充；relating to the context 为现在分词定语，in which work is performed 为定语从句修饰 context。

sentences.en: These include working conditions and job security. When these factors are unfavorable, job dissatisfaction may result.
sentences.zh: 这些因素包括工作条件和工作保障。当这些因素不利时，就可能产生工作上的不满。

grammar.type: 一般现在时 + when 条件从句
grammar.note: 首句 These include working conditions and job security；后句 When these factors are unfavorable 为条件状语从句，主句 job dissatisfaction may result，result 此处为不及物动词“产生、发生”。

sentences.en: Significantly, though, just fulfilling these needs does not result in satisfaction, but only in the reduction of dissatisfaction (Maroudas et al., 2008).
sentences.zh: 但值得注意的是，仅仅满足这些需求并不会带来满意，而只会减少不满（马鲁达斯等，2008）。

grammar.type: 动名词主语 + not...but 结构
grammar.note: Significantly, though 为插入性评注状语；主语为动名词短语 just fulfilling these needs；does not result in satisfaction, but only in the reduction of dissatisfaction，用 not... but only... 构成对比，两个 in 短语并列。

sentences.en: Employees also have intrinsic motivation needs or motivators, which include such factors as achievement and recognition.
sentences.zh: 员工还有内在的激励需求，即激励因素，它们包括成就感和认可之类的因素。

grammar.type: 非限制性定语从句
grammar.note: 主干 Employees also have intrinsic motivation needs or motivators；which include such factors as achievement and recognition 为非限制性定语从句，such... as 意为“诸如……的”。

sentences.en: Unlike extrinsic factors, motivator factors may ideally result in job satisfaction (Maroudas et al., 2008). Herzberg’s (1966) theory discusses the need for a ‘balance’ of these two types of needs.
sentences.zh: 与外在因素不同，激励因素在理想情况下可能带来工作满意（马鲁达斯等，2008）。赫茨伯格（1966）的理论论述了对这两类需求之间“平衡”的需要。

grammar.type: 介词短语状语 + 独立句
grammar.note: 首句 Unlike extrinsic factors 为介词短语作状语；主干 motivator factors may ideally result in job satisfaction；后句 Herzberg's theory discusses the need for a 'balance' of these two types of needs，of these two types of needs 为后置定语。

sentences.en: The impact of fun as a motivating factor at work has also been explored.
sentences.zh: 把乐趣作为工作中一种激励因素的影响，也已受到探究。

grammar.type: 现在完成时被动
grammar.note: 主干 The impact of fun... has also been explored（现在完成时被动）；as a motivating factor at work 为介词短语作 fun 的后置定语/状语。

sentences.en: For example, Tews, Michel and Stafford (2013) conducted a study focusing on staff from a chain of themed restaurants in the United States.
sentences.zh: 例如，图斯、米歇尔和斯塔福德（2013）开展了一项研究，聚焦于美国一家主题连锁餐厅的员工。

grammar.type: 现在分词定语
grammar.note: 主干 Tews, Michel and Stafford conducted a study；focusing on staff from a chain of themed restaurants 为现在分词短语作 study 的后置定语。

sentences.en: It was found that fun activities had a favorable impact on performance and manager support for fun had a favorable impact in reducing turnover.
sentences.zh: 研究发现，趣味活动对绩效有积极影响，而管理者对趣味活动的支持在降低离职率方面也有积极作用。

grammar.type: 形式主语 it + 宾语从句(并列)
grammar.note: It was found that...，it 为形式主语；从句含两个并列分句：fun activities had a favorable impact on performance 与 manager support for fun had a favorable impact in reducing turnover。

sentences.en: Their findings support the view that fun may indeed have a beneficial effect, but the framing of that fun must be carefully aligned with both organizational goals and employee characteristics.
sentences.zh: 他们的研究结果支持这样一种观点：乐趣确实可能产生有益的效果，但对乐趣的设定方式必须与组织目标和员工特征都谨慎地相契合。

grammar.type: 同位语从句 + but 转折 + 被动
grammar.note: 主干 Their findings support the view that...，that fun may indeed have a beneficial effect 为同位语从句；but the framing of that fun must be carefully aligned with...（被动），be aligned with 意为“与……一致、契合”，both... and... 并列。

sentences.en: ‘Managers must learn how to achieve the delicate balance of allowing employees the freedom to enjoy themselves at work while simultaneously maintaining high levels of performance’ (Tews et al., 2013).
sentences.zh: “管理者必须学会如何实现这种微妙的平衡：既让员工有在工作中享受乐趣的自由，同时又保持高水平的绩效”（图斯等，2013）。

grammar.type: 宾语从句 + while 时间/对比状语
grammar.note: 主干 Managers must learn how to achieve the delicate balance；of allowing employees the freedom to enjoy themselves 为 balance 的后置定语；while simultaneously maintaining high levels of performance 为 while 引导的对比/伴随状语（省略主语）。

sentences.en: Deery (2008) has recommended several actions that can be adopted at the organizational level to retain good staff as well as assist in balancing work and family life.
sentences.zh: 迪尔里（2008）建议了若干可在组织层面采取的举措，以留住优秀员工，并协助平衡工作与家庭生活。

grammar.type: 现在完成时 + 定语从句 + 不定式目的
grammar.note: 主干 Deery has recommended several actions；that can be adopted at the organizational level 为定语从句修饰 actions；to retain good staff as well as assist in balancing... 为不定式作目的状语，as well as 并列两动词。

sentences.en: Those particularly appropriate to the hospitality industry include allowing adequate breaks during the working day, staff functions that involve families, and providing health and well-being opportunities.
sentences.zh: 其中特别适合酒店业的举措包括：在工作日提供充足的休息时间、举办有家人参与的员工活动，以及提供有关健康和身心福祉的机会。

grammar.type: 后置定语 + 并列宾语
grammar.note: 主语 Those，particularly appropriate to the hospitality industry 为形容词短语作后置定语；谓语 include 后接三个并列成分：allowing adequate breaks..., staff functions that involve families（含定语从句）, and providing health and well-being opportunities。

questions.title: Questions 27–31
instructions: Look at the following statements (Questions 27–31) and the list of researchers below.
Match each statement with the correct researcher, A–F.
Write the correct letter, A–F, in boxes 27–31 on your answer sheet.
NB You may use any letter more than once.

items.prompt: Hotel managers need to know what would encourage good staff to remain.
The actions of managers may make staff feel they shouldn’t move to a different employer.
Little is done in the hospitality industry to help workers improve their skills.
Staff are less likely to change jobs if cooperation is encouraged.
Dissatisfaction with pay is not the only reason why hospitality workers change jobs.

questions.title: Questions 32–35
instructions: Do the following statements agree with the claims of the writer in Reading Passage 3?
In boxes 32–35 on your answer sheet, write
YES if the statement agrees with the claims of the writer
NO if the statement contradicts the claims of the writer
NOT GIVEN if it is impossible to say what the writer thinks about this

items.prompt: One reason for high staff turnover in the hospitality industry is poor morale.
Research has shown that staff have a tendency to dislike their workplace.
An improvement in working conditions and job security makes staff satisfied with their jobs.
Staff should be allowed to choose when they take breaks during the working day.

questions.title: Questions 36–40
instructions: Choose ONE WORD ONLY from the passage for each answer.
Write your answers in boxes 36–40 on your answer sheet.

items.prompt: Tews, Michel and Stafford carried out research on staff in an American chain of 36 ____ .
They discovered that activities designed for staff to have fun improved their 37 ____ ,
and that management involvement led to lower staff 38 ____ .
They also found that the activities needed to fit with both the company’s 39 ____ and the ... of the staff.
They also found that the activities needed to fit with both the company’s ... and the 40 ____ of the staff.
